note: Implemented thread-safe socket buffer access bridging application threads with the I/O thread. Refactored socket_ffi.rs to use DeviceNetEntry enum (Standalone vs Shared) so socket operations use the shared IoLoopContext when available. Added waker mechanism: wg_send wakes the I/O thread via Thread::unpark(), and the poll loop uses park_timeout instead of sleep. Added wake_io_thread() to WgDevice. All 476 tests pass.
